overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt walking along a scenic lakeside meadow toward a distant castle, wading through shallow water, and continuing along the shoreline during golden hour. The sequence showcases high-quality game engine rendering with warm cinematic lighting and lush natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside meadow path with distant castle view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy lakeside path toward the water, with swords visible on back

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires situated on the far shore of the lake
calm reflective water surface stretching across the middle of the frame
lush green grass path along the water's edge with wildflowers
dense cluster of deciduous trees on the left hillside
scattered red wildflowers in the grass near the path
tall purple flowering plants growing along the grassy bank
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a serene lakeside meadow during golden hour. The character walks forward along a grassy path lined with red poppies and purple lavender, with a majestic stone castle visible across the calm water. Oak trees and mountains frame the left side while wooden posts emerge from the lake's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake water with castle reflection

events.description: character steps from grassy shore into shallow lake water, creating ripples as he wades forward

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the center of the lake, continuing forward with steady pace

entered.detail: shallow water surrounding the character's legs with visible ripples and reflections
mirror reflection of the stone castle visible on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to water, wading through the shallow lake with the castle's reflection visible below. The water level rises to the character's waist as he continues forward. Wooden posts that were previously center-frame move to the left as the camera advances through the rippling water.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit shoreline with willow trees and golden hour lighting

events.description: character exits the water onto a grassy bank on the opposite shore
sunlight becomes intensely golden and backlit as the camera turns toward the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking up from the water onto the grassy bank and turning slightly right toward the sunset

entered.detail: large leafy trees with drooping branches silhouetted against the sunset
intense golden-orange sunlight creating lens flare and backlighting effects
rocky and grassy terrain along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a grassy and rocky shore, turning toward the setting sun. The lighting shifts dramatically to strong golden hour backlighting, silhouetting the willow trees on the right. The castle moves to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes, with the sun creating a warm glow across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene lakeside meadow into the shallow waters of a lake, eventually emerging onto a sun-drenched shoreline. It begins with the character walking along a grassy path lined with red poppies and purple lavender, with a majestic stone castle visible across the calm water. As the character transitions from the grass, the camera advances through rippling water that rises to the waist, causing the distant castle's reflection to shimmer below. The scene then shifts as the character emerges onto a rocky shore, turning toward the setting sun which creates a dramatic golden hour backlight. Finally, the perspective pivots so the castle moves to the left of the frame while the sun casts a warm, silhouetting glow across the nearby willow trees.
